description: Report (official state correspondence). 6 lines from the middle section are preserved. Refers to audiences with the caliph, the amīr Wajīh al-Dawla, and someone traveling from Ramla to Damascus via Banyas and (then?) to Sidon. Reused on recto for piyyuṭ.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
